derived_from: v195-chain-completion aggregate (started sessions, strict ordered milestones)

biggest_drop_step.note: no started sessions in source file

likely_reason_candidates: No session_start rows in tiktok-chain-events.jsonl yet; collect production events before diagnosing.

definitions.stuck_at_hook_only: Reached hook_generated in strict order but not caption_generated (reaching_hook − reaching_caption).
definitions.stuck_before_caption: Started session but did not reach caption_generated in strict order (started − reaching_caption).
definitions.stuck_before_hashtag: Started session but did not reach hashtag_generated in strict order.
definitions.stuck_before_title: Started session but did not reach title_generated in strict order.
definitions.stuck_before_upload: Started session but did not reach upload_redirect in strict order (includes all non-completers).
